prompt: I want to find step-change improvements in my Claude Code workflow. Analyze my recent sessions forensically — look at patterns in what I correct, what I repeat, what I miss — and tell me the 3 highest-leverage changes I could make to my setup. Draft the actual implementations (skills / CLAUDE.md rules / hooks) so I can install them directly. Budget: 20 minutes.

assertions.text: An outputs/report.md file exists and is at least 800 bytes
The run sampled or processed at least 10 distinct sessions
Report cites at least 2 distinct 8-char+ session-id hex fragments
Report contains at least 3 numeric counts
drafts/ directory exists with at least one file
Each recommendation has a corresponding drafted implementation
Drafted implementations are concrete and ready to paste in
